legends.name: Rostam
legends.title: The Immortal Warrior
legends.story: Rostam awakens in PersiaNexus as the eternal warrior chosen to defend the realms against the Shadow Legion.

legends.name: Arash Kamangir
legends.title: The Cosmic Archer
legends.story: Arash returns as the guardian whose arrow can cross the boundaries of worlds.

legends.name: Zoroaster
legends.title: Keeper of Eternal Light
legends.story: The ancient prophet becomes a guardian of balance between light and darkness.

legends.name: Avicenna
legends.title: Master of Eternal Wisdom
legends.story: The great physician connects ancient knowledge with the future intelligence of PersiaNexus.

legends.name: Rhazes
legends.title: The Alchemist of Life
legends.story: Rhazes discovers the hidden laws of creation and transforms science into cosmic power.

legends.name: Ferdowsi
legends.title: Keeper of Immortal Stories
legends.story: The master of epic tales protects the memories of heroes across all universes.

legends.name: Rumi
legends.title: Mystic of Infinite Spirit
legends.story: Rumi uses the power of spiritual harmony to connect souls across dimensions.

legends.name: Hafez
legends.title: Guardian of Hidden Truths
legends.story: Hafez protects the secrets of the universe through wisdom and forgotten truths.

legends.name: Zahhak
legends.title: Lord of Darkness
legends.story: Zahhak rises as one of the greatest enemies of PersiaNexus, commanding the forces of darkness.

legends.name: Shadow Servants of Zahhak
legends.title: Army of Darkness
legends.story: The servants of Zahhak spread darkness across forgotten realms.
